prayer:
Approach the amplivisor with mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Litany of Ignition upon its sacred lenses to awaken the dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the startup sequence whilst anointing the power conduits with blessed unguents.
Beseech the amplivisor's Spirit to align its magnifiers for flawless vision.
Verify the startup through canticles of calibration, honouring the Machine God's will.

Kneel before the magnocular and chant the Rite of Engagement to stir its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the focusing arrays of the magnocular with sacred oils of precision.
Command the engagement protocols, beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring sight.
Stabilise the magnocular's gyros with invocations against warp-taint.
Seal the rite by affirming the Machine Spirit's vigilant watch.

Present the webber to the altar of charging, invoking the Omnissiah's boundless energy.
Clear residue from the webber's expulsion chambers with purifying incense.
Commence the charging cycle, murmuring binaric prayers to appease its fractious Spirit.
Monitor the webber's power buildup through diagnostic litanies.
Conclude by sanctifying the fully charged webber for the Emperor's glory.

user_prompt: Bless the potentia coil for targeting
prayer:
Encircle the potentia coil with electro-incense, calling upon the Machine Spirits within.
Align the potentia coil's targeting matrices via the sacred Rite of Focus.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the potentia coil with lethal precision.
Cycle targeting energies through its coils, chanting verses of accuracy.
Affirm the potentia coil's blessed harmony with auspex hymns.

Reverently grasp the las-cutter and recite the Cycling Doxology to rouse its Spirit.
Purge las-cutter vents of impurities with sanctified abrasives.
Initiate the cycling procedure, anointing power cells with myrolactone.
Harmonise the las-cutter's emitters through resonant binaric tones.
Praise the Omnissiah as the las-cutter achieves perfect operational flux.

user_prompt: Critical: null rod requires a recalibration
prayer:
Isolate the null rod upon the recalibration shrine, invoking anti-psychic wards.
Chant the Recalibration Canticle over the null rod to realign its null-fields.
Anoint the null rod's core with void-blessed elixirs from the Omnissiah's forge.
Test the null rod's recalibration against simulated warp incursions.
Seal the rite, proclaiming the null rod's purity in the Machine God's name.

user_prompt: Help me a repair the Sentinel walker
prayer:
Circumambulate the Sentinel walker, beseeching its ancient Machine Spirit for renewal.
Apply mechadendrite salves to the Sentinel walker's damaged servos and plating.
Invoke the Rite of Repair, channeling Omnissiah's grace into fractured mechanisms.
Realign the Sentinel walker's auspex and weapons through litanies of restoration.
Awaken the Sentinel walker with triumphant binaric fanfare, whole once more.

user_prompt: Consecrate the Contemptor Dreadnought before charging
prayer:
Prostrate before the Contemptor Dreadnought, intoning the Charging Supplication.
Anoint its sarcophagus and weapon arms with oils of eternal vigilance.
Commence charging rites for the Contemptor Dreadnought, awakening its heroic Spirit.
Infuse power cores with sacred plasma, under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze.
Consecrate the fully charged Contemptor Dreadnought for unending war.

user_prompt: I need to a startup the diagnosticator
prayer:
Approach the diagnosticator humbly, reciting the Startup Benediction.
Clear its noospheric buffers with purifying data-exorcism.
Initiate the startup ritual for the diagnosticator, anointing sensor nodes.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the diagnosticator to reveal hidden faults.
Verify operational sanctity through Omnissiah-praised auspex scans.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for grav chute a loading
prayer:
Bless the grav chute with the Loading Invocation, honouring its anti-grav Spirit.
Secure the grav chute's deployment packs with mechadendrite seals.
Chant loading protocols, beseeching the Omnissiah for flawless descent.
Calibrate grav chute emitters amid clouds of electro-incense.
Affirm the grav chute's readiness with a final hymn of aerial grace.
